derived.causal_summary: The @debug agent ships across all four CLI runtimes (OpenCode, Claude, Codex, Gemini) with descriptions promising auto-dispatch on failure_count >= 3, but no executable code maintains that counter or invokes the Task tool. Zero debug-delegation.md instances exist in any spec folder despite a fully formed template. This packet rewrites every aspirational claim across the four runtime debug definitions, the orchestrator routing prose (.opencode/agent/orchestrate.md), and the two implementation YAML configs (spec_kit_implement_auto.yaml, spec_kit_complete_auto.yaml) so the descriptions match the real (user-invoked, prompted-offer) behavior. It also replaces the buried A/B/C/D failure-threshold menu with a direct y/n/skip prompt that pre-fills a debug-delegation.md scaffold on opt-in. Hard user constraint: NO autonomous routing under any condition.
